extraction.description: This screenshot shows UiPath Agent Builder in the Flow view with the tool picker panel open on the right. The user has searched for "servicenow" in the Choose tool panel, and the ServiceNow activity "Search Incidents by Incident Number" is visible and highlighted under Activities. On the canvas, the autonomous agent node is selected with the Tools connector active, indicating the user is adding a tool to the agent.
extraction.step_instructions:
1. Click on the + icon under the agent's Tools section to open the tool catalog.
2. In the Choose tool search field, enter "servicenow".
3. Select "Search Incidents by Incident Number" from the Activities list.
